intro: Pabstiella lingua is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its distinctive, elongated tongue-shaped petals and sepals. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as skin infections, wounds, and respiratory issues.
